behavior_summary: U8P_ARMGUARD::look is a short U8P_ARMGUARD::look/inspection process that emits a single bark ('arm guards') and then suspends/ends.
The function serves as an ambient/inspection response rather than a conversation: no menus, branches, or external calls are present.
The code is associated with a U8P_ARMGUARD::look/fast-area process type (0x0208) so it runs when the NPC/item is examined or when the player enters the related fast-area trigger.
notable_control_flow: Entry into U8P_ARMGUARD::look → emit bark 'arm guards' → suspend/terminate process immediately.
No conditional branches or subsequent logic are executed after the bark.
open_questions: Is the primary runtime trigger 'player uses U8P_ARMGUARD::look/examine' or 'enterFastArea' (both are possible given processType 0x0208)?
Item property metadata mentions an armour entry with armourClass = 3 — is that used elsewhere by game systems even though it is not referenced in this U8P_ARMGUARD::look process?

main_function.name: U8P_ARMGUARD::look
main_function.purpose: Provide a short ambient/inspection response when the NPC/item is examined or when the related fast-area is entered; specifically, play the bark 'arm guards' and then end the process.
entry_conditions: Player performs a 'U8P_ARMGUARD::look' (examine) action on the NPC/item.
Player enters the NPC's fast-area trigger region (inferred from processType 0x0208).

function_map.name: U8P_ARMGUARD::look
function_map.role: U8P_ARMGUARD::look handler that emits a one-line bark and suspends; no dialogue or branching.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_ARMGUARD::look is a short U8P_ARMGUARD::look/inspection process that emits a single bark ('arm guards') and then suspends/ends.
